title: A Very Unpleasant Mod
description: This Unpleasant Gradient Shows Up In Your Minecraft World
body: ![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Very_Unpleasant_Mod/BH_AVUM_header.webp) ![FEATURES](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Very_Unpleasant_Mod/BH_AVUM_features.webp) Adds An Unpleasant Gradient Who Is Very Friendly But Very Unpleasant To The Eye What Does Unpleasant Do? Well The Rectangle Entity Spawns On The Surface And Wanders Around, Opens Doors But Doesn't Close Them, You Can Breed The Unpleasant Gradients To Make More Unpleasant Gradients And Have Them Wander All Around Your World And Be Unpleasant To Breed The Unpleasant Gradients You Need To Feed Two of Them A Fermented Spider Eye Modeled and Animated By Kraftmasta ![Kraftmasta](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1639386421017423880/MoJQOr7L_400x400.jpg) Exported and Modded By TonyIsHereRN ![TonyIsHereRN](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1701025956155301888/3nXpT5MO_400x400.jpg) ![Bisect Hosting Partner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/A_Very_Unpleasant_Mod/BH_AVUM_promo.webp)
